about.description: Your trusted partner for disaster restoration and construction services across Colorado. We deliver expert restoration, reconstruction, and construction solutions for residential and commercial properties throughout Colorado's Front Range. One trusted company with two powerful divisions — Garnet Restoration and Garnet Construction — ready to respond when you need us most.

image.alt: Garnet restoration team on a commercial job site in Colorado

description: Garnet Companies was founded on a simple but powerful idea: disaster restoration and quality construction shouldn't require two separate companies. Property owners facing water damage, fire damage, or storm destruction were forced to juggle multiple contractors — one to clean up the mess, another to rebuild. It was inefficient, stressful, and slow. We knew there had to be a better way.

That's why we built Garnet Companies with two powerful divisions under one roof. Garnet Restoration handles the emergency — 24/7 response, on site in under 60 minutes, IICRC certified technicians ready to mitigate water, fire, and storm damage fast. Garnet Construction takes it from there — residential and commercial reconstruction, remodels, and property improvements delivered with ICC certified expertise. One call. One team. One seamless process from disaster to done.

Today, Garnet Companies proudly serves homeowners, businesses, and property managers across Colorado's Front Range — from Denver and Boulder to Fort Collins, Thornton, Westminster, Brighton, Longmont, Broomfield, Aurora, Commerce City, Estes Park, Lyons, and beyond. We're family owned and operated, BBB accredited, American Red Cross partners, and active Chamber members. When disaster strikes, we're the ones who show up. Fast.
Garnet Companies delivers expert restoration and construction services through two specialized divisions. From emergency water damage response to complete commercial construction, we handle it all.
IICRC certified restoration. ICC certified construction. BBB accredited. Family owned and operated. One call does it all.

section.headline: What Our Customers Say
section.description: Hear from homeowners and businesses who trusted Garnet Companies for restoration and construction across Colorado's Front Range.
section.featured: Trusted Restoration & Construction Across Colorado's Front Range

testimonials.name: Robert H.
testimonials.text: Garnet responded to our basement flood in under an hour. Their restoration team was professional, fast, and handled everything — including working directly with our insurance.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: We've used Garnet for multiple commercial projects. Their dual restoration and construction divisions mean we never have to coordinate between contractors. One call does it all.

testimonials.name: Mike D.
testimonials.text: Fire damage at our restaurant could have shut us down for months. Garnet handled the entire restoration and reconstruction — we were back open in weeks, not months.

testimonials.name: Jennifer C.
testimonials.text: Hail storm destroyed our roof and siding. Garnet was on site the next morning, handled the emergency tarping, and managed the entire insurance claim. Incredible service.

testimonials.name: Garnet Companies Team
testimonials.text: We built Garnet Companies to give Colorado property owners a single trusted partner for both restoration and construction. When disaster strikes, you shouldn't have to juggle multiple companies. One call. One team. Done right.

section.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
section.description: Expert answers about our restoration, construction, and emergency response services.

items.question: How fast can you respond to an emergency?
items.answer: We're on site in under 60 minutes for qualifying emergencies across Colorado's Front Range. Call (303) 409-7309 anytime — 24/7/365.

items.question: Do you work with insurance companies?
items.answer: Yes. We work directly with your insurance provider to streamline claims, handle documentation, and reduce your stress throughout the restoration process.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: Colorado's Front Range including Denver, Boulder, Fort Collins, Thornton, Westminster, Brighton, Longmont, Broomfield, Aurora, Commerce City, Estes Park, Lyons, and surrounding communities.

items.question: What types of damage do you restore?
items.answer: Water damage, fire damage, smoke damage, storm damage, hail damage, wind damage, and all related structural restoration.

items.question: Do you handle both residential and commercial construction?
items.answer: Yes. Garnet Construction handles residential and commercial projects including custom homes, remodels, tenant improvements, and full commercial build-outs.

items.question: Are your technicians certified?
items.answer: Yes. Garnet Restoration technicians are IICRC certified. Garnet Construction teams are ICC certified. Both divisions are fully licensed and insured.

items.question: What should I do while waiting for your team?
items.answer: Ensure your safety first. If safe, shut off water sources and move valuables away from affected areas. Our team will guide you through next steps upon arrival.

items.question: How does the restoration-to-construction process work?
items.answer: Seamlessly. After restoration is complete, our construction division takes over — no new contractor, no new estimates, no delays. One company, start to finish.

items.question: Do you offer free inspections?
items.answer: Yes. Schedule a professional property assessment online or by calling (303) 409-7309. We'll evaluate the damage and provide expert recommendations.

items.question: Is Garnet Companies family owned?
items.answer: Yes. We're family owned and operated, BBB accredited, American Red Cross partners, and active Chamber members in Colorado communities.

knowledgeCard.title: Still Have Questions?
knowledgeCard.description: Our restoration and construction specialists are ready to help. Call anytime — 24/7 emergency response available.
